latestIgtvVideos.caption:
6,760,161 runners.

189 countries worldwide.
 
One common goal.

Because of you, 250.000 kg/500,000 lbs of plastic waste will be cleaned up by @parley.tv’s Global Clean Up Network to help end plastic waste.

Proving that together, #impossibleisnothing.

#RunForTheOceans

We’ve all got reasons to help end plastic waste. But it’s when we come together that achieving it becomes possible.

Join @adidas @parley.tv and countless others from around the globe to Run For The Oceans today until June 8th by clicking the link in our bio 🌊🤍

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

The future is up to us.

We all have our reasons to save our planet. We do it for our homes, our families, for the next generation. 

Now is the time to Run For The Oceans to take action and help end plastic waste.

Sign up today and participate from May 23rd using the link in our bio. 

Together, impossible is nothing. 

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

“I’ve seen first-hand what plastic waste is doing to our beaches.” 

…and it isn’t pretty.

See why @pedri is joining the global movement from May 23rd to preserve the planet, and help take the next step to help end plastic waste using the link in our bio. 

Together, impossible is nothing.

@parley.tv 

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

“This isn’t an island problem, it is a world problem. It needs the world to do something about it”  

Reliance on our oceans keeps @hey_itsshaunae fighting for marine life.  

It takes us, too. Run For The Oceans from May 23rd to help end plastic waste. Link in bio to learn more. 

Together, impossible is nothing.

@parley.tv

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #impossibleisnothing

”I feel humbled every time I’m near the ocean. It makes me want to protect it and fight for it even more.” @domithiem 

We have a responsibility to save the oceans who give us life.

Join us and @parley.tv as we Run For The Oceans starting May 23rd to help end plastic waste.

Together, impossible is nothing. 

#RunForTheOceans #adidasParley #ImpossibleIsNothing

Impossible? Where’s the fun in that? 😏

#ImpossibleIsNothing

This is for all women.​

The ones who have paved the way for our generation to do the impossible

and those who continue to do so for generations to come.​

I’m possible, because she’s possible.​

#ImpossibleIsNothing #InternationalWomensDay

If you want to be on top of the podium, you have to be willing to put in the work. 

“My story is not impossible. Because I’m possible” 

@momiji_nishiya830 

#ImpossibleIsNothing

”So who’s going to tell me I’m not an athlete?​

My story is not impossible. Because I’m possible.”​

@mynameisjessamyn 

#ImpossibleIsNothing

“I am Fatima Ibrahimi. ​

I'm a runner no matter where I am. ​

Where I am from, I ran past the hate. ​

I ran past the yells, and the threats. ​

They didn't just fear me. ​

They feared what I was running for: women everywhere. ​

My story is not impossible. Because I'm possible.”​

#ImpossibleIsNothing​

latestPosts.caption:
Different relay. Same result for @lou_jml.

She claws back 13 places and 54 seconds in a ruthless 6km leg to turn the race on its head in the Women’s 4x6km Relay at #MilanoCortina2026.

That’s two Olympic golds for @lou_jml in Italy, delivered with total control on skis and ice in her veins on the range.

#YouGotThis

latestIgtvVideos.caption: It was never about what she got from basketball. It was always about what she gave back. Gigi gave inspiration to her teammates, her mentors, and the next generation. #PlayGigisWay @mambamambacitasports

Tiger would. Would you?
Break barriers. Set records. Play through pain and never call it a comeback. 

Tiger is never done.

Don’t call this the perfect Hollywood ending, because this is just the beginning. 

LA is never done.

ADVANTAGE, @rafaelnadal. 
 
1. FIRST SLAM ONLY NINETEEN YEARS OLD. 
2. SECOND SLAM. 
3. THIRD SLAM.
4. STILL UNDEFEATED ON CLAY.
5. GREATEST GAME EVER. FIVE SET THRILLER TO CLAIM FIRST TROPHY AWAY FROM CLAY. THEN THE GOLD MEDAL.
6. FIRST HARD COURT SLAM AT AUS.
7.  BACK TO WINNING WAYS ON CLAY. 
8. SECOND WIN AT SW19.
9. FIRST TRIUMPH AT FLUSHING MEADOWS MEANS TROPHY CABINET IS NOW FULL. 
10. 6TH FRENCH.
11. RECORD BREAKING SEVENTH FRENCH. 
12. RECORD EXTENDING EIGHTH FRENCH. 
13. SECOND US.
14. MOST CONSECUTIVE FRENCH TITLES BUT WHAT FOLLOWS IS TWO YEARS WITHOUT WINNING A TROPHY. IS IT THE END OF HIS CAREER? 
15. DEFIES THE DOUBTERS BY BECOMING THE ONLY MAN TO WIN TEN TROPHIES IN A SINGLE SLAM. 
16. THIRD US. 
17. RECORD EXTENDING ELEVENTH FRENCH.
18. RECORD EXTENDING TWELFTH FRENCH.
19. FIVE SET EPIC US TITLE. 
20 RECORD EQUALING 20TH SLAM. 
 
DEUCE. 
 
21. ADVANTAGE, NADAL.

“It doesn’t matter where you start because when you play to lift your people, no hoop is too high.” 

The world may know @giannis_an34 as an MVP and NBA champion, but it’s his work off the court that’s truly special. 

The AntetokounBros Academy is more than basketball, it’s a space where kids from diverse backgrounds are given the chance to unleash and develop their potential through sport. Where everyone and anyone feels they belong. 

With the help of @onassis.stegi and @eurohoops_official, Giannis has created something that he never had growing up. A place where you’re encouraged to follow your passion and where having fun is as important as working hard. On or off the court, one thing is for certain, Giannis is Never Done changing the game.

“When you figure out what makes you happy, you gotta keep doing it because you’re gonna be the best version of yourself.”

🎥 @hael_ky
📸 @eleni.albarosa
🎨 @nique.one

latestIgtvVideos.title: Common Thread | Episode 3: Vashti, RunGrl & Asra
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
“I think it is really important for black women to see themselves in others. We need to start sharing our stories more. We need to find ways to support each other, talk about hair and running because my gosh it’s hard. And also celebrate each other.” - @j_nesi
⠀
The final episode of the Common Thread series with Uninterrupted highlights those who relentlessly go forward together, from the track to the streets. Celebrating the power of sport to create community, inclusivity and sisterhood, athletes @vashtizzle, Jasmine Nesi of @rungrlco, and @sahraisha of @asra.club emphasize how our strides are united, moving through a marathon of collective progress. #BHM #UntilWeAllWin
⠀
🗣️: Vashti Cunningham
🎥: @childotu

latestIgtvVideos.title: Mamba Forever. Inspiration is forever
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
(sound on)

latestIgtvVideos.title: Common Thread | Episode 2: Crystal, Debra & Kairaba
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
“My color doesn’t stop me from doing what I want to do. We’re all playing with the same ball, we’re playing with eleven players on each side. Football isn’t made for a certain person. Football is a universal language, anyone can play it.” - Debra Nelson
⠀
The second episode of the Common Thread series featuring Debra Nelson (@FootballBeyondBorders), @its_kairabaaa (@fcharlem) and @cdunn19 (@uswnt) focuses on sport’s ability to transcend borders and boundaries with something as simple as a ball and a goal.
⠀
🗣️: Crystal Dunn
🎥: @childotu

latestIgtvVideos.title: Dalia: Cambiando el Futuro
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
“At first, my abuela, she didn’t get it. ‘Dalia, it’s too rough for a girl. Your mom was a cheerleader – why don’t you be a cheerleader?’ Football is where I get my strength. Where I prove that nothing is off-limits. Where I can be whatever I want.”
⠀
Dalia Hurtado’s family had specific expectations of her: Work hard, get good grades, and follow in her mother’s footsteps as a cheerleader. But cheering on the sideline was never an option for Dalia.
⠀
As a kid in Mexico, she was the only girl who would play soccer with the boys, and after moving back to East LA with her abuela, she set her sights on football. At 16, she became the only girl to make the varsity team at her high school. Two years later, she’s inspired more girls to play football at her high school.
⠀
Through football, Dalia is re-writing the story her family wrote for her, breaking through stereotypes, and empowering her community to do the same – one game at a time.

latestIgtvVideos.title: @marcgasol and @paugasol: Birthplace of Dreams
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
“We’re brothers, we shared the same room when we were kids. The fact that there were two future players in that same room who would be lucky to have great careers is remarkable.” - @marcgasol
⠀
“It is a lot of fun. We just feel so lucky, you know. That two brothers, doing what we love, at the level that we have achieved, it’s very rare.” - @paugasol
⠀
Pau and Marc Gasol first picked up a basketball in a small suburb of Barcelona, Sant Boi De Llobregat. From here they would start their journey to the NBA, FIBA World Championships and their ultimate goal – inspiring the next generation to live a healthier lifestyle.
⠀
Whether through the Gasol Foundation or Basquet Girona, the Gasol brothers know their legacy is bigger than basketball.
⠀
This is their Birthplace of Dreams. #justdoit

latestIgtvVideos.title: @virgilvandijk: Birthplace of Dreams
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
“I was born in Breda, but it's the things I’ve overcome on my journey from there that have made me the player I am today." - @virgilvandijk

Virgil Van Dijk was a football-obsessed kid playing on cage courts near his southern Holland home.

Years later and with many challenges overcome, he's a European Champion and recognized as the world’s best defender.

This is his Birthplace of Dreams. #justdoit

Nike Atelier for Jannik Sinner is taking ACG to new heights. 

Nike Atelier is the best of Nike, crafted to the exact specifications of the greatest athletes.

Vest featuring A.I.R. Technology for adaptive thermal control; ACG Zegama with custom, water-protective rubber coating; and a carabiner keychain shaped after an elevation map of the Alps.

One of one, not for sale.

latestPosts.caption:
The 90s didn’t follow rules, and neither did Suede. Skate crews, music scenes, city nights. One shoe, everywhere.

NEVER NOT SUEDE.

#PUMASuede

Basketball isn’t just the score. It’s the swagger. From Clyde’s courtside era to today, Suede stays a style statement. 

NEVER NOT SUEDE.

#PUMASuede
Dropping our new look for 2026 💪

A moment. A message. A shoe.
From sport to street, Suede always showed up where style meant something.

NEVER NOT SUEDE.

#PUMASuede

This year we’re choosing to serve looks 🔥

#RaceLouder

latestIgtvVideos.caption: It was never about what she got from basketball. It was always about what she gave back. Gigi gave inspiration to her teammates, her mentors, and the next generation. #PlayGigisWay @mambamambacitasports

Tiger would. Would you?
Break barriers. Set records. Play through pain and never call it a comeback. 

Tiger is never done.

Don’t call this the perfect Hollywood ending, because this is just the beginning. 

LA is never done.

ADVANTAGE, @rafaelnadal. 
 
1. FIRST SLAM ONLY NINETEEN YEARS OLD. 
2. SECOND SLAM. 
3. THIRD SLAM.
4. STILL UNDEFEATED ON CLAY.
5. GREATEST GAME EVER. FIVE SET THRILLER TO CLAIM FIRST TROPHY AWAY FROM CLAY. THEN THE GOLD MEDAL.
6. FIRST HARD COURT SLAM AT AUS.
7.  BACK TO WINNING WAYS ON CLAY. 
8. SECOND WIN AT SW19.
9. FIRST TRIUMPH AT FLUSHING MEADOWS MEANS TROPHY CABINET IS NOW FULL. 
10. 6TH FRENCH.
11. RECORD BREAKING SEVENTH FRENCH. 
12. RECORD EXTENDING EIGHTH FRENCH. 
13. SECOND US.
14. MOST CONSECUTIVE FRENCH TITLES BUT WHAT FOLLOWS IS TWO YEARS WITHOUT WINNING A TROPHY. IS IT THE END OF HIS CAREER? 
15. DEFIES THE DOUBTERS BY BECOMING THE ONLY MAN TO WIN TEN TROPHIES IN A SINGLE SLAM. 
16. THIRD US. 
17. RECORD EXTENDING ELEVENTH FRENCH.
18. RECORD EXTENDING TWELFTH FRENCH.
19. FIVE SET EPIC US TITLE. 
20 RECORD EQUALING 20TH SLAM. 
 
DEUCE. 
 
21. ADVANTAGE, NADAL.

“It doesn’t matter where you start because when you play to lift your people, no hoop is too high.” 

The world may know @giannis_an34 as an MVP and NBA champion, but it’s his work off the court that’s truly special. 

The AntetokounBros Academy is more than basketball, it’s a space where kids from diverse backgrounds are given the chance to unleash and develop their potential through sport. Where everyone and anyone feels they belong. 

With the help of @onassis.stegi and @eurohoops_official, Giannis has created something that he never had growing up. A place where you’re encouraged to follow your passion and where having fun is as important as working hard. On or off the court, one thing is for certain, Giannis is Never Done changing the game.

“When you figure out what makes you happy, you gotta keep doing it because you’re gonna be the best version of yourself.”

🎥 @hael_ky
📸 @eleni.albarosa
🎨 @nique.one

latestIgtvVideos.title: Common Thread | Episode 3: Vashti, RunGrl & Asra
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
“I think it is really important for black women to see themselves in others. We need to start sharing our stories more. We need to find ways to support each other, talk about hair and running because my gosh it’s hard. And also celebrate each other.” - @j_nesi
⠀
The final episode of the Common Thread series with Uninterrupted highlights those who relentlessly go forward together, from the track to the streets. Celebrating the power of sport to create community, inclusivity and sisterhood, athletes @vashtizzle, Jasmine Nesi of @rungrlco, and @sahraisha of @asra.club emphasize how our strides are united, moving through a marathon of collective progress. #BHM #UntilWeAllWin
⠀
🗣️: Vashti Cunningham
🎥: @childotu

latestIgtvVideos.title: Mamba Forever. Inspiration is forever
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
(sound on)

latestIgtvVideos.title: Common Thread | Episode 2: Crystal, Debra & Kairaba
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
“My color doesn’t stop me from doing what I want to do. We’re all playing with the same ball, we’re playing with eleven players on each side. Football isn’t made for a certain person. Football is a universal language, anyone can play it.” - Debra Nelson
⠀
The second episode of the Common Thread series featuring Debra Nelson (@FootballBeyondBorders), @its_kairabaaa (@fcharlem) and @cdunn19 (@uswnt) focuses on sport’s ability to transcend borders and boundaries with something as simple as a ball and a goal.
⠀
🗣️: Crystal Dunn
🎥: @childotu

latestIgtvVideos.title: Dalia: Cambiando el Futuro
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
“At first, my abuela, she didn’t get it. ‘Dalia, it’s too rough for a girl. Your mom was a cheerleader – why don’t you be a cheerleader?’ Football is where I get my strength. Where I prove that nothing is off-limits. Where I can be whatever I want.”
⠀
Dalia Hurtado’s family had specific expectations of her: Work hard, get good grades, and follow in her mother’s footsteps as a cheerleader. But cheering on the sideline was never an option for Dalia.
⠀
As a kid in Mexico, she was the only girl who would play soccer with the boys, and after moving back to East LA with her abuela, she set her sights on football. At 16, she became the only girl to make the varsity team at her high school. Two years later, she’s inspired more girls to play football at her high school.
⠀
Through football, Dalia is re-writing the story her family wrote for her, breaking through stereotypes, and empowering her community to do the same – one game at a time.

latestIgtvVideos.title: @marcgasol and @paugasol: Birthplace of Dreams
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
“We’re brothers, we shared the same room when we were kids. The fact that there were two future players in that same room who would be lucky to have great careers is remarkable.” - @marcgasol
⠀
“It is a lot of fun. We just feel so lucky, you know. That two brothers, doing what we love, at the level that we have achieved, it’s very rare.” - @paugasol
⠀
Pau and Marc Gasol first picked up a basketball in a small suburb of Barcelona, Sant Boi De Llobregat. From here they would start their journey to the NBA, FIBA World Championships and their ultimate goal – inspiring the next generation to live a healthier lifestyle.
⠀
Whether through the Gasol Foundation or Basquet Girona, the Gasol brothers know their legacy is bigger than basketball.
⠀
This is their Birthplace of Dreams. #justdoit

latestIgtvVideos.title: @virgilvandijk: Birthplace of Dreams
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
⠀
⠀
“I was born in Breda, but it's the things I’ve overcome on my journey from there that have made me the player I am today." - @virgilvandijk

Virgil Van Dijk was a football-obsessed kid playing on cage courts near his southern Holland home.

Years later and with many challenges overcome, he's a European Champion and recognized as the world’s best defender.

This is his Birthplace of Dreams. #justdoit

latestPosts.caption:
The 90s didn’t follow rules, and neither did Suede. Skate crews, music scenes, city nights. One shoe, everywhere.

NEVER NOT SUEDE.

#PUMASuede

Basketball isn’t just the score. It’s the swagger. From Clyde’s courtside era to today, Suede stays a style statement. 

NEVER NOT SUEDE.

#PUMASuede
Dropping our new look for 2026 💪

A moment. A message. A shoe.
From sport to street, Suede always showed up where style meant something.

NEVER NOT SUEDE.

#PUMASuede

This year we’re choosing to serve looks 🔥
